Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Forged]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — Striker techniques are not Forged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Harmony released Forged black blades.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Highgold man held a Forged sword of pale light.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — A Forged hand followed Lindon's palm motion.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Jai Long has Forged a circle that hovers over his head.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Wandering Titan hurls golden Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Forged madra manifests as blue-green leaves etched with an eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Sha Miara carries a Forged blade.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
